Interface RenderCanvasExt

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable, RenderCanvas
All Known Implementing Classes:
GLRenderCanvas, GLSubCanvas
public interface RenderCanvasExt extends RenderCanvas
An extensions interface for RenderCanvas providing additional methods for attaching framebuffers, flushing, etc.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface RenderCanvas

    ORIGINAL_SIZE

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    attachTarget(Framebuffer target)
    Attaches a new framebuffer for the canvas to draw on.
    void
    clear()
    Clears the entire surface.
    void
    flush()
    Flushes all pending operations, if any.
